summary_highlights: X can boost candidate generation without becoming a stable primary source。
X can provide repeat-convergence signals across trusted authors。
X can attach editorial and weak risk context to canonical objects。
x_signal_lane.summary_excerpt: First mock collector output showing how X watchlist signals can feed the current evolution discovery system。
x_signal_lane.lane_note: X 只作为 author-signal / editorial-reference / weak risk 的信号层，不作为 stable ingest。

stable.description: 稳定主源，优先承载 GitHub、官方文档、官方 changelog 等可复查证据。

signal.description: 信号增强层，只提供 why-now、editorial weighting、weak risk。

verification.description: 验证与扩展层，承载校准判断、search enrichment、补背景说明。
